prompt: {"type":"hand-drawn Chinese infographic poster","style":"retro risograph zine aesthetic, textured off-white paper background, rough brush lettering, sketchy pen lines, halftone shading, limited ink palette of deep purple and teal with slight misregistration, energetic doodles and arrows","topic":"AI cognition externalization trilogy","headline":{"text":"AI的认知外化三部曲","position":"top center","style":"large expressive Chinese brush lettering, with the letters AI oversized in teal and purple"},"layout":{"flow":"left to right, three-stage evolution diagram connected by arrows, with a large sweeping curved arrow across the bottom pointing right","sections":[{"title":"2022-2023 推参数","position":"left","count":4,"labels":["大脑","GPT-4","Gemini","DeepSeek"],"scene":"a large illustrated brain containing a tall stack of rectangular layers like model parameters or books, with three small pinned labels on the left side reading GPT-4, Gemini, and DeepSeek; the large word 大脑 appears prominently inside the brain"},{"title":"2023-2024 递纸条","position":"center","count":5,"labels":["提示词","检索信息","AI","提示词 + RAG","用完即弃"],"scene":"a human hand extends from the left holding a note toward a side-profile human head silhouette labeled AI; two paper notes are visible, one labeled 提示词 with smaller handwritten Chinese lines beneath, and one labeled 检索信息 with smaller bullet-like Chinese lines; below the head is the phrase 提示词 + RAG, and near the bottom right is a small trash can with the label 用完即弃; a dashed line curves toward the trash can"},{"title":"2024-至今 搭基础设施","position":"right","count":5,"labels":["AI","记忆库","技能库","MCP","沙箱"],"scene":"a head silhouette labeled AI embedded inside a scaffold-like technical framework with pipes, connectors, and platforms; four surrounding modules are attached: a cylindrical database tower labeled 记忆库, a toolbox-like container labeled 技能库, a rectangular node card labeled MCP, and a cube-like container labeled 沙箱"}],"centerpiece":"the three phases of AI evolution from internal model scaling to prompt-based interaction to infrastructure-based cognition externalization","bottom_banner":"从内卷大脑 → 到借纸条 → 再到搭基础设施 认知外化，AI 才真正拥有了翅膀！"},"objects":{"left_section_details":"brain drawn as a cloud-like organic form, stacked slabs in the center, small lightning doodles around it","middle_section_details":"the prompt note includes the heading 提示词, the retrieval note includes the heading 检索信息, the human head is a simple side silhouette, and the interaction is shown as feeding notes into the AI head","right_section_details":{"memory_module":{"title":"记忆库","visible_text_items_count":4,"items":["长期记忆","用户偏好","历史对话","知识沉淀"]},"skills_module":{"title":"技能库","visible_text_items_count":4,"items":["工具集合","API调用","工作流","插件"]},"mcp_module":{"title":"MCP","visible_text_items_count":4,"items":["通信协议","能力发现","连接服务","安全控制"]},"sandbox_module":{"title":"沙箱","visible_text_items_count":4,"items":["隔离执行","代码运行","环境隔离","安全防护"]}}},"decorative_elements":{"count":8,"items":["sparkles","star doodles","radiating lines","lightning bolts","ink splatters","scribble underlines","small motion marks","curved directional arrows"]},"composition":"wide landscape poster, dense but readable, playful and conceptual, combines editorial illustration and systems diagram, all text in Chinese, visually communicates the evolution of AI systems across three time periods"}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"手绘中文信息图海报","style":"复古孔版印刷杂志美学，纹理感米白色纸张背景，粗犷的毛笔字，写意钢笔线条，网点阴影，深紫与青色的有限油墨配色，带有轻微套印偏差，充满活力的涂鸦和箭头","topic":"AI 认知外化三部曲","headline":{"text":"AI 的认知外化三部曲","position":"顶部居中","style":"大型表现力毛笔书法，其中 AI 二字以青色和紫色超大号字体呈现"},"layout":{"flow":"从左至右，三个阶段的演进图通过箭头连接，底部有一条巨大的弧形箭头指向右侧","sections":[{"title":"2022-2023 推参数","position":"左","count":4,"labels":["大脑","GPT-4","Gemini","DeepSeek"],"scene":"一个巨大的大脑插图，内部包含一叠像模型参数或书籍一样的矩形层，左侧有三个小标签，分别写着 GPT-4、Gemini 和 DeepSeek；大脑内部醒目地写着 大脑 二字"},{"title":"2023-2024 递纸条","position":"中","count":5,"labels":["提示词","检索信息","AI","提示词 + RAG","用完即弃"],"scene":"一只人手从左侧伸出，向一个标注为 AI 的侧面人头剪影递送纸条；可见两张纸条，一张标注为 提示词，下方有较小的手写中文行，另一张标注为 检索信息，下方有类似项目符号的中文行；人头下方是 提示词 + RAG 字样，右下角有一个标注为 用完即弃 的小垃圾桶；一条虚线向垃圾桶弯曲"},{"title":"2024-至今 搭基础设施","position":"右","count":5,"labels":["AI","记忆库","技能库","MCP","沙箱"],"scene":"一个标注为 AI 的人头剪影嵌入在一个类似脚手架的技术框架中，包含管道、连接器和平台；周围附有四个模块：一个标注为 记忆库 的圆柱形数据库塔，一个标注为 技能库 的工具箱式容器，一张标注为 MCP 的矩形节点卡，以及一个标注为 沙箱 的立方体容器"}],"centerpiece":"AI 演进的三个阶段，从内部模型缩放，到基于提示词的交互，再到基于基础设施的认知外化","bottom_banner":"从内卷大脑 → 到借纸条 → 再到搭基础设施 认知外化，AI 才真正拥有了翅膀！"},"objects":{"left_section_details":"大脑绘制成云朵般的有机形态，中心堆叠着板状物，周围有闪电涂鸦","middle_section_details":"提示词纸条包含 提示词 标题，检索纸条包含 检索信息 标题，人头为简单的侧面剪影，交互表现为向 AI 头中投喂纸条","right_section_details":{"memory_module":{"title":"记忆库","visible_text_items_count":4,"items":["长期记忆","用户偏好","历史对话","知识沉淀"]},"skills_module":{"title":"技能库","visible_text_items_count":4,"items":["工具集合","API 调用","工作流","插件"]},"mcp_module":{"title":"MCP","visible_text_items_count":4,"items":["通信协议","能力发现","连接服务","安全控制"]},"sandbox_module":{"title":"沙箱","visible_text_items_count":4,"items":["隔离执行","代码运行","环境隔离","安全防护"]}}},"decorative_elements":{"count":8,"items":["闪光","星星涂鸦","放射线","闪电符号","墨水溅点","涂鸦下划线","小动作标记","弯曲的方向箭头"]},"composition":"宽幅横向海报，内容密集但易读，兼具趣味性与概念性，结合了编辑插画与系统图表，所有文字均为中文，直观传达了 AI 系统在三个时期内的演进"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 中文 AI 演进信息图海报：此提示词用于生成一张手绘风格的中文信息图海报，解释 AI 演进的三个阶段，适用于科技评论、社交媒体帖文或编辑类视觉内容。
breakdown.subject: 信息结构
breakdown.text: 要求可读；包含标注/说明
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: editorial, retro, hand-drawn]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求可读；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
